notableEvents.label: Nick Kurtz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Kurtz grounds into a double play, second baseman Casey Schmitt to shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Bryce Eldridge. Henry Bolte out at 2nd. Nick Kurtz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jonah Heim pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonah Heim flies out to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Victor Bericoto homers (2) on a fly ball to center field.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Lawrence Butler lines out sharply to second baseman Casey Schmitt. Joey Meneses to 2nd. Throwing error by second baseman Casey Schmitt. Jacob Wilson out at home on the throw, left fielder Victor Bericoto to catcher Eric Haase. Joey Meneses to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Victor Bericoto walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Victor Bericoto homers (2) on a fly ball to center field.
